hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && echo "[Branch: $(git branch --show-current)] $(git status --short | head -5)" || true

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$file_path" in */pnpm-lock.yaml) echo "BLOCKED: pnpm-lock.yaml is managed by pnpm — do not edit manually." >&2; exit 2 ;; */.githooks/*) echo "BLOCKED: git hooks are infrastructure — ask the user before modifying." >&2; exit 2 ;; */src/tokens/colors/*.css) echo "BLOCKED: color token files are carefully calibrated — ask the user before modifying." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

command=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$command" in *'git commit'*) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm format 2>/dev/null && pnpm lint:fix 2>/dev/null && git add -u && vue_files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E 'src/components/.*\.vue$' || true) && if [ -n "$vue_files" ]; then echo '--- DELIVERY CHECKLIST ---' >&2; echo 'Component files staged. Verify:' >&2; echo '1. Exports in index.js + public.js' >&2; echo '2. Docs page + nav.js entry' >&2; echo '3. Test file in __tests__/' >&2; echo '4. Both themes tested' >&2; echo '5. Keyboard accessible' >&2; echo '---' >&2; fi ;; esac

file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$file_path" in */dist/*|*/node_modules/*|*/src/tokens/colors.css) exit 0 ;; *.vue|*.js|*.css|*.json|*.md) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null ;; esac
